requirements.subtitle: Mandatory criteria for potential YMCC VII strategic pillars.
requirements.req_1_d: Active students from class of 2024 & 2025 as proven by KTA/KRS.
requirements.req_2_d: Consistent until the end of entire agenda series (±1.5 years).
requirements.req_3_d: Interest in innovation, sustainability, and openness to learning.
requirements.req_4_d: Able to work with dynamics, withstand pressure, & solution-oriented.
requirements.req_5_d: Proficient in Google Workspace, Discord, and management tools.
requirements.req_6_d: Professional Indonesian, English as an added value.
